news.title: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.

news.title: Ashton Kutcher leaving Sound Ventures to launch new VC firm with Morgan Beller
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Sound built its reputation on concentrated, high-conviction bets in category-leading AI labs, while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the infrastructure and energy that power them.

news.title: Cloudflare’s new policy pushes AI companies to pay for publishers’ content
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Cloudflare is giving AI companies until September 15 to separate web crawlers used for search from those used for AI training and agents, or risk being blocked by default on many publisher sites.

news.title: Trump Administration Lifts Restrictions on Anthropic's Claude Models After Cybersecurity Alarm
news.description: [U.S. NEWS & WORLD REPORT] SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The Trump administration has lifted restrictions on artificial intelligence company Anthropic's latest versions of its Claude chatbot, ending a weekslong ban tied to cybersecurity concerns.

news.title: Bitcoin (BTC) climbs toward $60,000 level after Fed Chair Warsh said inflation risks has come down
news.description: [COINDESK] The Fed chair reiterated the central bank's commitment to its 2% inflation target while signaling artificial intelligence could reshape the economy and monetary policy.

news.title: AI looms over Silicon Valley students’ career choices
news.description: [THE MERCURY NEWS] As artificial intelligence use increases in classrooms and workplaces, students are beginning to factor the technology into decisions about college majors and careers.
